title: IIM Bangalore is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIM Bangalore is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore:
IIM Bangalore is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore!
